prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第27名，近年排名稳定在23–27名区间，属于国 内顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学涉嫌严重违纪违法被查事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名 第85位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；2024年曾出现录取断档信号（中关注），2025年重庆某专业投档线异常（低关注），历史断档记录可能使部分考生产生观望心理。 第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个，包括冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，医学、材料、计算机 等方向对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度重合，可能吸 引更多高分考生报考；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退，该校相关专业竞争可能相对缓和。四川省2026年普通高考报名总数约53.5万人，较2025年（物理类+历史类约46.3万 人）大幅增加约15.5%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约32.9万人，竞争显著加剧。2026年；中南大学位于湖南省长沙市，与四川省 同属中西部地区，地域偏好上无明显劣势；该校在四川招生计划占比较稳定，无显著跨省偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10898名、2026年计划小幅扩招约3.9% （位次数字增大方向）、四川省物理类考生大幅增加约15.5%（位次数字减小方向，竞争加剧）以及声誉偏负面（位次数字增大方向）等多重因素，考生规模扩张带来的竞争加剧 效应远大于扩招缓解效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年进一步前移（更难进）；预测最低位次约11001名，区间10501–11501名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11540 → 6899 → 10024 → 10898. In 2023, due to changes in exam difficulty, there was a significant forward shift, while in 2024–2025, it continued to move backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4000 positions over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 10898. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Sichuan was 181 in both 2022 and 2023, increased to 185 in 2024, and adjusted back to 181 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 188, a slight expansion of about 3.9% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 27th, with recent rankings stable in the 23–27 range, placing it among the top domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 85th, with a general evaluation, indicating low exposure on short video platforms. In 2024, there were signs of admission gaps (medium attention), and in 2025, an abnormal admission score line for a major in Chongqing (low attention). Historical gap records may lead some candidates to adopt a wait-and-see attitude. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc. Its strong disciplinary strength, especially in medicine, materials, and computer science, strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology are consistently highly recommended, heavily overlapping with the university's advantageous disciplines, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. Majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged, so competition for related majors may be relatively moderate. In 2026, the total number of registrations for the Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is about 535,000, a significant increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000 for physics and history categories combined). Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 329,000 physics category candidates, leading to significantly intensified competition. In 2026, Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, which, like Sichuan, is in the central and western regions, with no obvious regional preference disadvantage. Its enrollment plan proportion in Sichuan is relatively stable, with no significant cross-provincial preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 10898, a slight enrollment expansion of about 3.9% in 2026 (direction of increasing ranking number), a significant increase of about 15.5% in Sichuan physics category candidates (direction of decreasing ranking number, intensified competition), and a somewhat negative reputation (direction of increasing ranking number), the competition intensification effect from the expansion of the candidate pool far outweighs the easing effect from enrollment expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will further move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11001, with a range of 10501–11501.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering)
- Automation (Automation and Electrical Engineering)
- Software Engineering
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Metallurgy and Materials)
- Civil Engineering (Civil and Safety Engineering)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (Chemistry, Biology, Environment)
- Transportation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10501–11501, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10500), one can focus on aiming for top-tier majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology 5+3, and Computer Science. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 11500), one should use Tier 3 majors such as Materials, Civil Engineering, and Chemical as safety options while striving for moderately difficult Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information and Automation.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1690 → 1803 → 1657 → 2198. In 2024, there was a slight forward shift, followed by a significant backward shift of about 541 places in 2025; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2198. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Sichuan was 21 students each year from 2022 to 2024, increasing to 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24 students, a reduction of about 7.7% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top domestic institutions. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the investigation of former President Zhang Yaoxue, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 85th, rated as average. In 2024, there were signs of admission gaps (medium attention), and historical gap records may lead some candidates to adopt a wait-and-see attitude. The university's advantageous liberal arts disciplines include Marxist Theory (A-), and while law, Chinese language and literature, and other majors have not received A-level ratings, they rely on the university's overall platform strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a socially hot recommendation, Chinese language and literature is recommended, and popular liberal arts majors have stable popularity. Finance (economics and management category) has a socially divided wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the total number of applicants for the Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 535,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on recent proportions, history category candidates are estimated at about 206,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 2025 (approximately 178,000), significantly intensifying competition. In 2026, Central South University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, both in the central and western regions with Sichuan, with no obvious regional preference disadvantage. The university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a small but stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2198, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 7.7% (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies), a significant increase of about 15.7% in history category candidates in Sichuan (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies), and a somewhat negative reputation (ranking number increases), the expansion of candidate numbers and enrollment reduction jointly drive intensified competition, with effects far outweighing the offsetting impact of negative reputation. It is predicted that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will further shift forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2047, with a range of 1755–2339.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1755–2339, it is recommended to take Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature Category as the main choice, Tier 1 Law and Finance as reach options, and Tier 3 Foreign Language and Literature Category and Digital Publishing as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1755), focus on reaching for Law and Finance; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 2339), use Tier 3 majors as safety.
